name: Spider Farmer 10-Port GGS Pro Adapter
notes: RJ12 hub with 10 numbered ports; expands RJ12 connectivity for the GGS ecosystem (humidifiers, fans, sensors, etc.). Compatible with GGS Controller, AC5, AC10, Pro Controller, and S-Station. Includes 1x RJ12 cable. AUD $22.99; not found on Amazon.de. US product page returning 404 at time of research.
